message:
fix(web): prevent crash when myers_diff unavailable for different-length sequences

Fresh eyes review found that if only `equal_len_diff` exists in WASM but
sequences have different lengths, the code would try to call undefined
`myers_diff`, causing a runtime error. Now properly falls back to JS.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
